word: ๏ฌชึธ๏ฌชึตืจ
slug: ๏ฌชึธ๏ฌชึตืจ

sections.paragraph: , in pause ๏ฌชึธ๏ฌชึทืจ m. red colour, red ochre, rubrica, Jer 22:14. Vulg. sinopis, i.e. rubrica Sinopensis, which was most esteemed, see Plin. H. N., xxxv. 5, s. 13. LXX. ฮผฮฏฮปฯฮฟฯ, in Hom. rubrica. The Hebrews render it cinnabar, vermilion.
